metadata.name: mmtf-python
metadata.summary: A decoding libary for the PDB mmtf format

functions.name: mmtf.converters.numpy_converters.convert_bytes_to_ints
documentation:
Convert a byte array into an integer array. The number of bytes forming an integer
is defined by num

```
param in_bytes

the input bytes

param num

the number of bytes per int
```

\:return the integer array

functions.name: mmtf.converters.numpy_converters.decode_chain_list
documentation:
Convert a list of bytes to a list of strings. Each string is of length mmtf.CHAIN_LEN

```
param in_bytes

the input bytes
```

\:return the decoded list of strings

functions.name: mmtf.converters.numpy_converters.convert_ints_to_floats
documentation:
Convert integers to floats by division.
\:param in_ints: the integer array
\:param divider: the divider
\:return the array of floats produced

functions.name: mmtf.converters.numpy_converters.recursive_index_decode
documentation:
Unpack an array of integers using recursive indexing.

```
param int_array

the input array of integers

param max

the maximum integer size

param min

the minimum integer size
```

\:return the array of integers after recursive index decoding

functions.name: mmtf.codecs.decoders.decoders.run_length_decode
documentation:
A function to run length decode an int array.
\:param in_array: the input array of integers
\:return the decoded array

functions.name: mmtf.codecs.decoders.decoders.delta_decode
documentation:
A function to delta decode an int array.

```
param in_array

the input array of integers
```

\:return the decoded array

functions.name: mmtf.codecs.decoders.numpy_decoders.delta_decode
documentation:
A function to delta decode an int array.

```
param in_array

the input array of integers
```

\:return the decoded array

functions.name: mmtf.codecs.decoders.numpy_decoders.run_length_decode
documentation:
A function to run length decode an int array.

```
param in_array

the input array of integers
```

\:return the decoded array

functions.name: mmtf.converters.converters.convert_bytes_to_ints
documentation:
Convert a byte array into an integer array. The number of bytes forming an integer
is defined by num
\:param in_bytes: the input bytes
\:param num: the number of bytes per int
\:return the integer array

functions.name: mmtf.converters.converters.convert_ints_to_bytes
documentation:
Convert an integer array into a byte arrays. The number of bytes forming an integer
is defined by num

```
param in_ints

the input integers

param num

the number of bytes per int
```

\:return the integer array

functions.name: mmtf.converters.converters.decode_chain_list
documentation:
Convert a list of bytes to a list of strings. Each string is of length mmtf.CHAIN_LEN

```
param in_bytes

the input bytes
```

\:return the decoded list of strings

functions.name: mmtf.converters.converters.encode_chain_list
documentation:
Convert a list of strings to a list of byte arrays.

```
param in_strings

the input strings
```

\:return the encoded list of byte arrays

functions.name: mmtf.converters.converters.convert_ints_to_floats
documentation:
Convert integers to floats by division.

```
param in_ints

the integer array

param divider

the divider
```

\:return the array of floats produced

functions.name: mmtf.converters.converters.convert_ints_to_chars
documentation:
Convert integers to chars.

```
param in_ints

input integers
```

\:return the character array converted

functions.name: mmtf.converters.converters.convert_floats_to_ints
documentation:
Convert floating points to integers using a multiplier.

```
param in_floats

the input floats

param multiplier

the multiplier to be used for conversion. Corresponds to the precisison.
```

\:return the array of integers encoded

functions.name: mmtf.converters.converters.convert_chars_to_ints
documentation:
Convert an array of chars to an array of ints.

```
param in_chars

the input characters
```

\:return the array of integers

functions.name: mmtf.converters.converters.recursive_index_encode
documentation:
Pack an integer array using recursive indexing.

```
param int_array

the input array of integers

param max

the maximum integer size

param min

the minimum integer size
```

\:return the array of integers after recursive index encoding

functions.name: mmtf.converters.converters.recursive_index_decode
documentation:
Unpack an array of integers using recursive indexing.
\:param int_array: the input array of integers
\:param max: the maximum integer size
\:param min: the minimum integer size
\:return the array of integers after recursive index decoding

functions.name: mmtf.codecs.encoders.encoders.run_length_encode
documentation:
A function to run length decode an int array.

```
param in_array

the inptut array of integers
```

\:return the encoded integer array

functions.name: mmtf.codecs.encoders.encoders.delta_encode
documentation:
A function to delta decode an int array.

```
param in_array

the inut array to be delta encoded
```

\:return the encoded integer array

classes.name: mmtf.codecs.codecs.DeltaRecursiveFloat
documentation:
Covert an array of floats to integers, perform delta
encoding and then use recursive indexing to store as 2
byte integers in a byte array.

classes.name: mmtf.codecs.codecs.RunLengthFloat
documentation:
Covert an array of floats to integers, perform run-length
encoding and then store as four byte integers in a byte array.

classes.name: mmtf.codecs.codecs.RunLengthDeltaInt
documentation:
Delta encode an array of integers and then perform run-length
encoding on this and then store as four byte integers in a byte array.

classes.name: mmtf.codecs.codecs.RunLengthChar
documentation:
Convert chars to integers and run-length encoode these and then store as
four byte integers in a byte array.

classes.name: mmtf.codecs.codecs.EncodeString
documentation:
Convert strings to set length byte arrays (in this case four). If
a string is of lenght less than four a null byte is used instead.

classes.name: mmtf.codecs.codecs.ByteToInt
documentation: Convert integers to single bytes and store in byte array.

classes.name: mmtf.codecs.codecs.FourByteToInt
documentation: Convert integers to four bytes and store in byte array.

functions.name: mmtf.codecs.default_codec.decode_array
documentation:
Parse the header of an input byte array and then decode using the input array,
the codec and the appropirate parameter.

```
param input_array

the array to be decoded
```

\:return the decoded array

functions.name: mmtf.codecs.default_codec.encode_array
documentation:
Encode the array using the method and then add the header to this array.

```
param input_array

the array to be encoded

param codec

the integer index of the codec to use

param param

the integer parameter to use in the function
```

\:return an array with the header added to the fornt

functions.name: mmtf.tests.codec_tests.run_all
documentation: Test that a given codec can work in the forward backward and round trip both ways.

classes.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_reader.MMTFDecoder

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_reader.MMTFDecoder.get_coords
documentation: Utility function to get the coordinates as a single list of tuples.

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_reader.MMTFDecoder.get_bonds
documentation: Utility function to get all the inter group bonds for the structure in pairs.

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_reader.MMTFDecoder.decode_data
documentation:
Function to decode the input data and place it onto the class.
\:param input_data: the input data as a dict

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_reader.MMTFDecoder.pass_data_on
documentation:
Write the data from the getters to the setters.

```
param data_setters

a series of functions that can fill a chemical
```

data structure
\:type data_setters: DataTransferInterface
Class to decode raw mmtf data into a parsed data model that can be fed into other data model

functions.name: mmtf.api.default_api._internet_on
documentation:
Check to see if the internet is on by pinging a set address.
\:param address: the IP or address to hit
\:return: a boolean - true if can be reached, false if not.

functions.name: mmtf.api.default_api.write_mmtf
documentation:
API function to write data as MMTF to a file

:param file_path the path of the file to write
:param input_data the input data in any user format
:param input_function a function to converte input_data to an output format. Must contain all methods in TemplateEncoder

functions.name: mmtf.api.default_api.pass_data_on
documentation:
Helper to pass data from one data structure to another.

:param input_data the input data in any user format
:param input_function a function to converte input_data to an output format. Must contain all methods in TemplateEncoder.
:param output_data a data holder for the data to be put into.

functions.name: mmtf.api.default_api.get_raw_data_from_url
documentation:
" Get the msgpack unpacked data given a PDB id.

```
param pdb_id

the input PDB id
```

\:return the unpacked data (a dict)

functions.name: mmtf.api.default_api.get_url
documentation:
Get the URL for the data for a given PDB id.

```
param pdb_id

the input PDB id
```

\:return the URL for this PDB id

functions.name: mmtf.api.default_api.fetch
documentation:
Return a decoded API to the data from a PDB id.

```
param pdb_id

the input PDB id
```

\:return an API to decoded data

functions.name: mmtf.api.default_api.parse
documentation:
Return a decoded API to the data from a file path.

```
param file_path

the input file path. Data is not entropy compressed (e.g. gzip)
```

\:return an API to decoded data

functions.name: mmtf.api.default_api.parse_gzip
documentation:
Return a decoded API to the data from a file path. File is gzip compressed.
\:param file_path: the input file path. Data is gzip compressed.
\:return an API to decoded data

functions.name: mmtf.api.default_api.ungzip_data
documentation:
Return a string of data after gzip decoding

:param the input gziped data
:return  the gzip decoded data

functions.name: mmtf.utils.codec_utils.parse_header
documentation:
Parse the header and return it along with the input array minus the header.
:param input_array the array to parse
:return the codec, the length of the decoded array, the parameter and the remainder
of the array

functions.name: mmtf.utils.codec_utils.add_header
documentation:
Add the header to the appropriate array.
:param the encoded array to add the header to
:param the codec being used
:param the length of the decoded array
:param the parameter to add to the header
:return the prepended encoded byte array

functions.name: mmtf.utils.decoder_utils.add_atom_data
documentation:
Add the atomic data to the DataTransferInterface.
:param data_api the data api from where to get the data
:param data_setters the class to push the data to
:param atom_nams the list of atom names for the group
:param element_names the list of element names for this group
:param atom_charges the list formal atomic charges for this group
:param group_atom_ind the index of this atom in the group

functions.name: mmtf.utils.decoder_utils.add_group_bonds
documentation:
Add the bonds for this group.
:param data_setters the class to push the data to
:param bond_indices the indices of the atoms in the group that
are bonded (in pairs)
:param bond_orders the orders of the bonds

functions.name: mmtf.utils.decoder_utils.add_group
documentation:
Add the data for a whole group.
:param data_api the data api from where to get the data
:param data_setters the class to push the data to
:param group_index the index for this group

functions.name: mmtf.utils.decoder_utils.add_chain_info
documentation:
Add the data for a whole chain.
:param data_api the data api from where to get the data
:param data_setters the class to push the data to
:param chain_index the index for this chain

functions.name: mmtf.utils.decoder_utils.add_atomic_information
documentation:
Add all the structural information.
:param data_api the data api from where to get the data
:param data_setters the class to push the data to

functions.name: mmtf.utils.decoder_utils.generate_bio_assembly
documentation:
Generate the bioassembly data.
:param data_api the interface to the decoded data
:param struct_inflator the interface to put the data into the client object

functions.name: mmtf.utils.decoder_utils.add_inter_group_bonds
documentation:
Generate inter group bonds.
Bond indices are specified within the whole structure and start at 0.
:param data_api the interface to the decoded data
:param struct_inflator the interface to put the data into the client object

functions.name: mmtf.utils.decoder_utils.add_header_info
documentation:
Add ancilliary header information to the structure.
:param data_api the interface to the decoded data
:param struct_inflator the interface to put the data into the client object

functions.name: mmtf.utils.decoder_utils.add_xtalographic_info
documentation:
Add the crystallographic data to the structure.
:param data_api the interface to the decoded data
:param struct_inflator the interface to put the data into the client object

functions.name: mmtf.utils.decoder_utils.add_entity_info
documentation:
Add the entity info to the structure.
:param data_api the interface to the decoded data
:param struct_inflator the interface to put the data into the client object

functions.name: mmtf.utils.decoder_utils.get_bonds
documentation: Utility function to get indices (in pairs) of the bonds.

functions.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.get_unique_groups
documentation: Function to get a unique list of groups.

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.Group.__eq__
documentation: Function to define equality

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.Group.convert_to_dict
documentation: Convert the group object to an appropriate DICT

classes.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.TemplateEncoder

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.TemplateEncoder.init_structure
documentation:
Initialise the structure object.
\:param total_num_bonds: the number of bonds in the structure
\:param total_num_atoms: the number of atoms in the structure
\:param total_num_groups: the number of groups in the structure
\:param total_num_chains: the number of chains in the structure
\:param total_num_models: the number of models in the structure
\:param structure_id the: id of the structure (e.g. PDB id)

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.TemplateEncoder.set_atom_info
documentation:
Create an atom object an set the information.
\:param atom_name: the atom name, e.g. CA for this atom
\:param serial_number: the serial id of the atom (e.g. 1)
\:param alternative_location_id: the alternative location id for the atom, if present
\:param x: the x coordiante of the atom
\:param y: the y coordinate of the atom
\:param z: the z coordinate of the atom
\:param occupancy: the occupancy of the atom
\:param temperature_factor: the temperature factor of the atom
\:param element: the element of the atom, e.g. C for carbon. According to IUPAC. Calcium  is Ca
\:param charge: the formal atomic charge of the atom

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.TemplateEncoder.set_chain_info
documentation:
Set the chain information.
\:param chain_id: the asym chain id from mmCIF
\:param chain_name: the auth chain id from mmCIF
\:param num_groups: the number of groups this chain has

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.TemplateEncoder.set_entity_info
documentation:
Set the entity level information for the structure.
\:param chain_indices: the indices of the chains for this entity
\:param sequence: the one letter code sequence for this entity
\:param description: the description for this entity
\:param entity_type: the entity type (polymer,non-polymer,water)

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.TemplateEncoder.set_group_info
documentation:
Set the information for a group
\:param group_name: the name of this group,e.g. LYS
\:param group_number: the residue number of this group
\:param insertion_code: the insertion code for this group
\:param group_type: a string indicating the type of group (as found in the chemcomp dictionary.
Empty string if none available.
\:param atom_count: the number of atoms in the group
\:param bond_count: the number of unique bonds in the group
\:param single_letter_code: the single letter code of the group
\:param sequence_index: the index of this group in the sequence defined by the enttiy
\:param secondary_structure_type: the type of secondary structure used (types are according to DSSP and
number to type mappings are defined in the specification)

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.TemplateEncoder.set_model_info
documentation:
Set the information for a model.
\:param model_id: the index for the model
\:param chain_count: the number of chains in the model

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.TemplateEncoder.set_xtal_info
documentation:
Set the crystallographic information for the structure
\:param space_group: the space group name, e.g. "P 21 21 21"
\:param unit_cell: an array of length 6 with the unit cell parameters in order: a, b, c, alpha, beta, gamma

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.TemplateEncoder.set_header_info
documentation:
Sets the header information.
\:param r_free: the measured R-Free for the structure
\:param r_work: the measure R-Work for the structure
\:param resolution: the resolution of the structure
\:param title: the title of the structure
\:param deposition_date: the deposition date of the structure
\:param release_date: the release date of the structure
\:param experimnetal_methods: the list of experimental methods in the structure

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.TemplateEncoder.set_bio_assembly_trans
documentation:
Set the Bioassembly transformation information. A single bioassembly can have multiple transforms,
\:param bio_assembly_index: the integer index of the bioassembly
\:param input_chain_indices: the list of integer indices for the chains of this bioassembly
\:param input_transformation: the list of doubles for  the transform of this bioassmbly transform

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.TemplateEncoder.finalize_structure
documentation: Any functions needed to cleanup the structure.

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.TemplateEncoder.set_group_bond
documentation:
Add bonds within a group.
\:param atom_index_one: the integer atom index (in the group) of the first partner in the bond
\:param atom_index_two: the integer atom index (in the group) of the second partner in the bond
\:param bond_order: the integer bond order

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.TemplateEncoder.set_inter_group_bond
documentation:
Add bonds between groups.
\:param atom_index_one: the integer atom index (in the structure) of the first partner in the bond
\:param atom_index_two: the integer atom index (in the structure) of the second partner in the bond
\:param bond_order the bond order
Template class to be used by third parties to pass data into other data structures.

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.encode_data
documentation: Encode the data back into a dict.

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.get_msgpack
documentation: Get the msgpack of the encoded data.

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.init_structure
documentation:
Initialise the structure object.
\:param total_num_bonds: the number of bonds in the structure
\:param total_num_atoms: the number of atoms in the structure
\:param total_num_groups: the number of groups in the structure
\:param total_num_chains: the number of chains in the structure
\:param total_num_models: the number of models in the structure
\:param structure_id the: id of the structure (e.g. PDB id)

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.set_atom_info
documentation:
Create an atom object an set the information.
\:param atom_name: the atom name, e.g. CA for this atom
\:param serial_number: the serial id of the atom (e.g. 1)
\:param alternative_location_id: the alternative location id for the atom, if present
\:param x: the x coordiante of the atom
\:param y: the y coordinate of the atom
\:param z: the z coordinate of the atom
\:param occupancy: the occupancy of the atom
\:param temperature_factor: the temperature factor of the atom
\:param element: the element of the atom, e.g. C for carbon. According to IUPAC. Calcium  is Ca
\:param charge: the formal atomic charge of the atom

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.set_chain_info
documentation:
Set the chain information.
\:param chain_id: the asym chain id from mmCIF
\:param chain_name: the auth chain id from mmCIF
\:param num_groups: the number of groups this chain has

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.set_entity_info
documentation:
Set the entity level information for the structure.
\:param chain_indices: the indices of the chains for this entity
\:param sequence: the one letter code sequence for this entity
\:param description: the description for this entity
\:param entity_type: the entity type (polymer,non-polymer,water)

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.set_group_info
documentation:
Set the information for a group
\:param group_name: the name of this group,e.g. LYS
\:param group_number: the residue number of this group
\:param insertion_code: the insertion code for this group
\:param group_type: a string indicating the type of group (as found in the chemcomp dictionary.
Empty string if none available.
\:param atom_count: the number of atoms in the group
\:param bond_count: the number of unique bonds in the group
\:param single_letter_code: the single letter code of the group
\:param sequence_index: the index of this group in the sequence defined by the enttiy
\:param secondary_structure_type: the type of secondary structure used (types are according to DSSP and
number to type mappings are defined in the specification)

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.set_model_info
documentation:
Set the information for a model.
\:param model_id: the index for the model
\:param chain_count: the number of chains in the model

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.set_xtal_info
documentation:
Set the crystallographic information for the structure
\:param space_group: the space group name, e.g. "P 21 21 21"
\:param unit_cell: an array of length 6 with the unit cell parameters in order: a, b, c, alpha, beta, gamma

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.set_header_info
documentation:
Sets the header information.
\:param r_free: the measured R-Free for the structure
\:param r_work: the measure R-Work for the structure
\:param resolution: the resolution of the structure
\:param title: the title of the structure
\:param deposition_date: the deposition date of the structure
\:param release_date: the release date of the structure
\:param experimnetal_methods: the list of experimental methods in the structure

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.set_bio_assembly_trans
documentation:
Set the Bioassembly transformation information. A single bioassembly can have multiple transforms,
\:param bio_assembly_index: the integer index of the bioassembly
\:param input_chain_indices: the list of integer indices for the chains of this bioassembly
\:param input_transformation: the list of doubles for  the transform of this bioassmbly transform

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.finalize_structure
documentation: Any functions needed to cleanup the structure.

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.set_group_bond
documentation:
Add bonds within a group.
\:param atom_index_one: the integer atom index (in the group) of the first partner in the bond
\:param atom_index_two: the integer atom index (in the group) of the second partner in the bond
\:param bond_order: the integer bond order

methods.name: mmtf.api.mmtf_writer.MMTFEncoder.set_inter_group_bond
documentation:
Add bonds between groups.
\:param atom_index_one: the integer atom index (in the structure) of the first partner in the bond
\:param atom_index_two: the integer atom index (in the structure) of the second partner in the bond
\:param bond_order the bond order
